content.rendered:
We are more than just equipment sellers—we are your knowledgeable telecommunication industry consultants.

Our main business includes a wide range of communication equipment and materials:
• Optical Access Network: Full series of OLT, ONU, ONT, GPON, EPON
• Transmission & Supporting: Full series of SFP modules, Passive WDM, pigtails, patch cords, dummy test fibers, etc.
• Power Equipment: Base station embedded power supplies, OLT power supplies, power rectifier modules, etc.
• Terminals & Accessories: Engineering equipment and various communication supplies and accessories (e.g., fiber cleavers, fiber holders, etc.)

Our Advantage:
Our team has years of experience in communication engineering design and has been deeply involved in the planning and design of 5G/4G/NB, bearer/access networks, FTTH, and more. Although technical consulting is not our core service, this background allows us to better understand your pain points when helping you select the right products.

We fully understand the compatibility requirements of network architectures. Therefore, instead of offering complex network design services, we focus on: quickly recommending the optimal brand combinations and equipment configurations based on your needs—helping you get the most site-appropriate products within a reasonable budget.

Choosing us means partnering with a supply chain expert who has the technology, the resources, and the reliability you can count on.

Due to the large number of SKUs, we only display some of our products online. The prices shown are for retail only. If you are a wholesaler, distributor, engineering contractor, or network service operator, please contact us to negotiate the most favorable pricing. We have a complete range of communication products available—welcome to inquire!

content.rendered:
Your Trusted Source for Communication & Network Equipment

Established in 2021, Sichuan Haoxiong Trading Co., Ltd. is a specialized supplier of telecommunications and network equipment. We offer a comprehensive portfolio of high-quality products, including fiber-optic solutions, 5G equipment, and network infrastructure, supported by professional technical support and system integration services. Committed to full compliance and a customer-centric philosophy, we strive to be your trusted partner for efficient procurement and customized end-to-end solutions.
